description: Plugin-distributed hooks for legacy-modernization. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this modernization deliverable against the §2 house opinions (no big-bang rewrite without an incremental path, every cutover has a tested rollback, characterize before changing, date+source every external figure). Set LEGACY_MODERNIZATION_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
